title: The Tea Party Falls Apart
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Judge, Unknown person #10, Chiffon, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Do not ever mention to anyone...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Never show your face in front of us again!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will promise... not to come near you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anything more than this is different from what you promised!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll die as well if you don't do it,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Until you and Caesar make an escape through the air,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We Germa will undertake the job of escorting you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why the hell do you get to decide what I do!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Your overbearing attitude really hasn't changed, Judge!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Germa is also able to fly through the air, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...then it's fine to leave you here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OK!! If it's to buy time, I'll help o...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We refuse to be in the debt...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a sec here!! Hey, I haven't agreed to doing it yet, you idiots!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 39 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
